background_gradient.label: Background gradient
background_gradient.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.

disable_zoom_mobile.label: Disable image zoom on touch devices

logo_background.label: Enable background
logo_background.info: Only have affect when Logo background is enabled

country_region_selector.info: To add a country/region, go to your [market settings.](/admin/settings/markets)
country_region_selector.label: Enable country/region selector

language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)
language_selector.label: Enable language selector

menu.label: Main menu
menu.info: Connect the menu list to the file

overview_link.label: Show overview link
overview_link.info: Displays an overview link within the dropdown or mega menu, linking to the target content of the parent menu. [Learn more](https://support.emsoftech.com/header/overview-link)

header_layout.label: Layout
header_layout.info: The search bar position will be below the logo in mobile.

menu-type.label: Desktop menu type
menu-type.info: Menu type is automatically optimized for mobile.

menu-style.label: Desktop menu style
menu-style.info: Menu style is automatically optimized for mobile.

logo_background.label: Enable background
logo_background.info: Only have affect when Logo background is enabled

email_signup.label: Email signup
email_signup.info: Subscribers are added automatically to your “accepted marketing” customer list. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/customers/manage-customers)

follow_on_shop.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)
follow_on_shop.label: Enable Follow on Shop

enable_country.label: Enable country/region selector
enable_country.info: To add a country/region, go to your [markets settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

enable_language.label: Enable language selector
enable_language.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

menu.label: Menu
menu.info: Connect the menu list to the file

menu_heading.label: Heading
menu_heading.info: This text will be displayed instead of the menu title

title_background.label: Enable title background
title_background.info: Only have affect when title background is enabled

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

view_all.label: Enable "View all" if collection has more products than shown
view_all.info: In the slider layout, the link is located in the heading

view_all.label: Enable "View all" if blog has more posts than shown

alignment.label: Card align
alignment.info: This option only works when one card has more content and the adjacent card has less content, there must be at least two cards in a row for it to work

tablet_columns.label: Tablet columns
tablet_columns.info: 1 is the default value on mobile

product-recommendations.name: Product recommendations
product-recommendations.paragraph: Dynamic recommendations change and improve over time. Create custom product recommendations using the Shopify Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations).

play_pause_toggle.label: Play and pause toggle
play_pause_toggle.info: This feature is available only if autoplay is enabled.

mobile_layout.info: Content will show below background image

text-position.label: Text position
text-position.info: This option only works if the overlay image is hidden

text-width.label: Text width
text-width.info: This option only works if the overlay image is hidden

card_style.label: Card style
card_style.option_3: Vertical image and text with arrow

button_text.label: Button text
button_text.info: When using the 'Vertical image and text with arrow' card style, the button will be replaced with an arrow button. As a result, the button text will no longer be visible.

alignment.label: Alignment
alignment.info: This option only works when one card has more content and the adjacent card has less content, there must be at least two cards in a row for it to work

video_url.label: URL
video_url.info: Use youtube or vimeo video url

description.label: Description
description.info: Describe the video for customers using screen readers.

video_width.label: Video container width
video_width.info: Minimum width is set for ipad (70% of width) and mobile (100% of width).

media_background.label: Media background
media_background.info: Only have affect when media background is enabled

dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
dynamic_checkout.info: Customers can choose their preferred payment option, such as PayPal or Apple Pay, from the available methods in your store. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift cards
gift_card_recipient.info: Allows buyers to send gift cards with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

backorder_text.label: Backorder text
backorder_text.info: This text will appear when a product is out of stock but available for backorder. Make sure 'Track quantity' and 'Continue selling when out of stock' are enabled in the product's inventory settings.

specifications.label: Specifications
specifications.info: Overrides the content, Include namespace and key of the 'Single line text (List)' metafield definition. E.g. custom.specifications. The list value should be in the format as follows Spec name : Spec value

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

specs.label: Specifications
specs.info: Create or connect a list of 'Single line text' metafield

specifications.label: Specifications
specifications.info: Overrides the content, Include namespace and key of the 'Single line text (List)' metafield definition. E.g. custom.specifications. The list value should be in the format as follows Spec name : Spec value

logo_background.label: Enable background
logo_background.info: Only have affect when Logo background is enabled

first_button_label.label: First button label
first_button_label.info: Leave the label blank to hide the button

second_button_label.label: Second button label
second_button_label.info: Leave the label blank to hide the button

button_label.label: Button label
button_label.info: Leave the label blank to hide the button

product.label: Product
product.info: Select a product with the deal and then apply the deal ending date below

text_width.label: Text width
text_width.info: Text will be full width on smaller screens.

open_first.label: Open first
open_first.info: Open the first item by default.

collapsible_options.label: Behavior
collapsible_options.info: Choose how collapsibles behave when one is opened.

content_width.label: Content width
content_width.info: Content will be full width on smaller screens.

aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: Aspect ratio for a single grid column. Used to maintain consistent height across all items.

layout.desktop_info: The desktop grid has 6 columns. Select how many columns this block should span.
layout.tablet_info: The tablet grid has 4 columns. Select how many columns this block should span.
layout.mobile_info: The mobile grid has 2 columns. Select how many columns this block should span.

description.label: Description
description.default: Use this space to highlight promotions, seasonal messages, or key product features.

play_on.label: Play on
play_on.info: On touch devices, videos will always play on click, regardless of the selected setting.
